prompt: Create a high-detail anime sci-fi fantasy illustration of a full-body gothic cyber elf girl standing confidently on an industrial catwalk in a dark futuristic megastructure. The character has pale icy blue short bob hair with straight bangs, small black hair ornaments on one side, long pointed elf ears, pale skin, and red eyes with a calm, slightly melancholic expression. She wears an elaborate black armored gothic outfit: spiked segmented chest armor, asymmetrical shoulder and arm armor, chains, straps, black lace-like mechanical details, a torn sheer black skirt with printed skull graphics, thigh straps, dark stockings, and sharp high-heeled armored boots with small glowing red accents. Behind her looms an enormous biomechanical dragon-like war machine or alien battleship head, made of black gunmetal plates, jagged horn-like fins, layered armor, cables, and glowing crimson slits and reactor details. The setting is a vast dystopian industrial dockyard with scaffolding, cranes, pipes, hanging chains, warning signs, platforms, misty blue-gray atmosphere, and tiny birds in the bright hazy sky. Use a vertical portrait composition, character placed slightly right of center, the colossal machine filling the left and rear background for scale. Visual style: ultra-polished modern Japanese anime concept art, cinematic lighting, intricate mechanical detail, dark gunmetal palette with red emissive highlights, cool blue ambient fog, sharp linework, painterly rendering, dramatic depth, no extra characters, no watermark, no readable logo text except small industrial warning markings.
